calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2026 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Apr-08-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings not reported.

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A is represented by John Phan, Esq.
Defendant Sharon Rowley not appearing.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank, N.A, and against Defendant Sharon Rowley, as follows:

1. Damages: $37,738.15
2. Costs: $0

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $37,738.15

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2026 Continued To May-19-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jan-09-2026 Continued To Apr-08-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505 - Matter Not Reported

Plaintiff JPMorgan Chase Bank appearing represented by Jeremy Loforge, Esq. in court.
Defendant Sharon Rowley not appearing.

As there were no courtesy copies provided prior to this hearing, this matter is continued to April 8, 2026 at 9:00am in dept. 505 to allow counsel an oppertunity to accomplish this.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Continued To Feb-10-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Nov-19-2025 Continued To Jan-09-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505
Matter not reported.

Attorney for Plaintiff William Bellor-Yeh is present via zoom.
Defendant Sharon Rowley not appearing.

Mr. Bellor-Yeh reqests a continuance to obtain a witness for this hearing and to provide the court with courtesy copies.

This matter is continued to January 9, 2025 at 9:00am in dept. 505.
